check_2_consent_gate.notes: 9 older pay-test/sandbox pages lack consent gate. Live pages (live, awakened, partnered, unified, insiders, insiders/awakened, pay-test-sandbox-3) all pass.

check_3_pricing_accuracy.notes: insiders/awakened shows $149 not $74.50. May be intentional — spec says $74.50 for insider pages.

check_4_paypal_integration.notes: insiders/awakened, pay-test-sandbox, pay-test missing PayPal SDK. These are older/deprecated pages.

check_5_seed_flow.notes: Both send-seed and seed-addendum return OPTIONS 204.

check_6_welcome_email.notes: agentmail-monitor active, dual-send logic present, payer_emails_by_uuid.json exists.

check_9_secrets.notes: Brevo xkeysib- API key exposed in 21+ payment page HTML files. Same key across all pages. This is a KNOWN ISSUE — key appears in legacy Brevo email-capture JS blocks.

critical_failures.description: Brevo API key (xkeysib-9f445c...) exposed in client-side HTML across 21+ payment pages

warnings.description: 9 older pay-test pages lack consent gate JS (pay-test-sandbox, pay-test-sandbox-2, pay-test-sandbox-5, pay-test, pay-test-2, pay-test-5, pay-test-awakened, pay-test-partnered, pay-test-unified)
3 pages missing PayPal SDK (insiders/awakened, pay-test-sandbox, pay-test)
